label: Constraint satisfaction, SAT & SMT solving

node.label: Constraint satisfaction, SAT & SMT solving
node.definition: Constraint, SAT, and SMT solvers search for assignments satisfying logical, arithmetic, bit-vector, temporal, or theory-specific formulas.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Constraint satisfaction, SAT & SMT solving is modeled as depending on Constraint propagation, logic & program execution, Discrete mathematics & logic and feeding downstream nodes such as Theorem proving & symbolic deduction, Cybersecurity, finance & operational risk AI, Formal verification of models.

limitations: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Constraint propagation, logic & program execution, Discrete mathematics & logic.
